calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for Defendant's motion for order directing clerk to release interpleaded funds to James Cowan.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:09:04 p.m. and concluding at 02:15:00 p.m.

Plaintiff Fidelity National Title Company not appearing.
Defendant James B. Cowan appearing representing by Kenneth Charles Greene, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

JAMES B. COWAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Defendant.

Default entered as to remaining Defendants Jingsi Chen, Jianzhong Chen, Jianfeng Kuang on Aug-02-2022.

Order Discharging and Dismissing Plaintiff Fidelity National Title company Pursuant to Code Civ. Proc. 386(b); 386.5 filed Nov-15-2022.

Defendant's motion for order directing clerk to release interpleaded funds to James Cowan is argued and GRANTED as follows:

1. The Clerk of the Court shall release the remaining funds being held in connection with this matter in the amounto f $28,817.85 to Defendant James B. Cowan;

2. Said funds shall be sent forthwith to counsel of record for Defendant Cowan, to wit, the Law Office of Kenneth Charles Greene, 5743 Corsa Avenue, Suite 208, Westlake Village, CA 91362.

3. Thereafter, this case shall be deemed closed.

Motion To Discharge And Dismiss Stakeholder Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. 386.B, 386.5 And Award Of Costs
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows

PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S Motion To Discharge And Dismiss Stakeholder Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. 386.B, 386.5 And Award Of Costs is GRANTED is as requested.
Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that tracks the Court's ruling. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501)
